summary: Actions not SHA-pinned (critical violation of stated criteria; `actions/checkout@v4` must be `actions/checkout@<SHA>#`). `continue-on-error: true` in license-check step masks failures—job exits 0 even when licenses are denied, unexpected for a CI gate. Module design solid (DI for testability), workflow triggers sensible, test harness thorough but repetitive (3 case blocks repeat assertions). Fixture paths hardcoded in run-act-tests.ps1. PowerShell best practices followed (Set-StrictMode, proper errors). Would not ship; needs action SHA pinning + clarified failure semantics.
